title: Neon Pong
summary: A glowing neon twist on the classic Pong game, built with HTML5 Canvas. Challenge the AI or a friend in this retro arcade favorite with dazzling visual effects.

title: Pixel Invaders
summary: Defend the Earth from waves of pixelated alien invaders in this love letter to classic space shooters. Features progressive difficulty and power-ups.

title: Retro Racer
summary: Race through neon-lit highways at breakneck speed. Dodge traffic, collect power-ups, and try to beat your high score in this endless racer.

title: Synth Maze
summary: Navigate procedurally generated mazes while collecting synth crystals. Each level is uniquely generated and the soundtrack evolves as you progress deeper.

title: Laser Blaster
summary: A fast-paced twin-stick shooter where you blast through hordes of geometric enemies. Features combo multipliers and an electrifying synthesizer soundtrack.

title: Grid Runner
summary: Inspired by Tron's light cycles, race across a grid leaving walls behind you. Trap your opponents while surviving as long as possible on the glowing arena.
